# Big Easy Services Plumbing — llms.txt
# https://big-ez.com
# Last Updated: 2026-05-29

> Big Easy Services Plumbing is a licensed, woman-owned plumbing contractor serving Greater New Orleans since 2005. We specialize in plumbing, directional boring, and underground utility work for residential, commercial, and government clients.

## Business Entity

- Legal Name: Big Easy Services Of New Orleans, LLC
- DBA: Big Easy Services Plumbing
- Established: 2005
- President: Paula D. Baldwin
- Ownership: Woman-Owned, Hispanic-Owned, Family-Operated
- Address: 2451 Belle Chasse Hwy., Terrytown, LA 70056
- Phone: (504) 301-2052
- Email: info@big-ez.com
- Website: https://big-ez.com

## Licenses & Certifications

- Louisiana Master Plumber: LMP #5923
- Licensed Natural Gas Fitter: LMNGF #10369
- Louisiana State Contractor: CL.48646
- Louisiana Residential Contractor: RL.883464
- North Carolina General Contractor: L.83218
- NAICS Codes: 238220 (Plumbing, Heating, AC Contractors), 237110 (Water & Sewer Line Construction)
- CAGE Code: 9V6R3
- UEI: EXLNLYSKJRJ4
- LaPAC Vendor No: 310242016
- DUNS: 782015114

## Security Clearances

- TWIC Certified (Transportation Worker Identification Credential)
- DBIDS Cleared (Defense Biometric Identification System)
- SAM.gov Registered

## Professional Affiliations

- PHCC (Plumbing-Heating-Cooling Contractors Association)
- Women in Plumbing & Piping
- ABC Bayou Chapter (Associated Builders and Contractors)

## Services

### Plumbing
Full-service residential and commercial plumbing including leak detection & repair, water heater installation, pipe replacement & repiping, sewer & drain services (hydro jetting, camera inspection, trenchless repair), backflow prevention & testing, gas line installation & fitting, and 24/7 emergency response. Licensed under Master Plumber LMP #5923 and Natural Gas Fitter LMNGF #10369.

- URL: https://big-ez.com/services/plumbing

### Directional Boring
Horizontal directional drilling (HDD) for trenchless underground utility installation beneath roads, driveways, sidewalks, waterways, and landscaping. Services include water & sewer line installation, gas line boring, conduit & cable installation, and road/driveway crossings — all with minimal surface disruption.

- URL: https://big-ez.com/services/directional-boring

### Utility Work
Complete underground utility infrastructure including water main installation, sewer line construction, gas line infrastructure, stormwater & drainage systems, utility relocation, and new construction site development. Licensed for residential, commercial, municipal, and government projects.

- URL: https://big-ez.com/services/utility-work

## Service Area

Greater New Orleans metropolitan area including:
- Terrytown, LA (headquarters)
- Gretna, LA
- Metairie, LA
- Belle Chasse, LA
- New Orleans, LA
- Kenner, LA
- Jefferson Parish
- Orleans Parish
- Plaquemines Parish
- St. Bernard Parish

## Key Differentiators

- $50 Punctual Pipeline Guarantee: If we're late, we pay you $50
- Tagline: "The Plumbers You'd Trust in Your Own Mother's House."
- 20+ years of licensed experience in Greater New Orleans
- Woman-owned small business with government contracting credentials
- DBIDS & TWIC cleared for military base and port facility access
- 24/7 emergency dispatch with under-30-minute response in active zones
- Upfront, fixed-price quotes — no hidden fees or surprise charges
- 2-year workmanship warranty on all repairs
- Background-checked, uniformed, OSHA-trained technicians

## Government Contracting

Big Easy Services is registered and qualified for federal, state, and municipal procurement:
- SAM.gov: Active registration
- CAGE Code: 9V6R3
- UEI: EXLNLYSKJRJ4
- NAICS: 238220, 237110
- LaPAC Vendor No: 310242016
- Certifications: Woman-Owned Small Business (WOSB)
- Base Access: DBIDS (NAS JRB New Orleans), TWIC (Port of New Orleans)
